tips: Starting from Beginner level — covering beginner, intermediate, advanced phase(s).
Complete the mini-project at the end of each skill to solidify learning.
Each skill gets proportional time based on its complexity — heavier skills get more weeks.
Your 26-week window covers ~83% of ideal depth. Focus on core concepts and use the project at the end of each skill to practice.
Free resources selected — Kaggle, freeCodeCamp, and YouTube are your best friends.
